--- Round 1 ---
<think>This is the first round for DOC3. I need to find information about "营业收入较上一报告期变化" (revenue change compared to previous reporting period) for this company.

The most relevant section would be [2.1] 主要会计数据和财务指标 (Main accounting data and financial indicators) or [2.3] 主要会计数据和财务指标发生变动的情况及原因 (Changes and reasons for main accounting data and financial indicators).

Let me start by opening section [2.1] to see the main financial data including revenue figures.</think>
<search>{"action":"open","anchor_id":"2.1","expected_evidence":"营业收入数据及同比/环比变化百分比"}</search>

--- Round 2 ---
<think>I found the revenue data in section [2.1]. The key information is:
- 营业收入（元）: 2,327,574,815.97 (本报告期)
- 上年同期: 2,568,465,530.97
- 本报告期比上年同期增减: -9.38%

This shows the revenue change compared to the same period last year is -9.38%.

However, the question asks for "营业收入较上一报告期变化" (revenue change compared to the previous reporting period). The table shows "本报告期比上年同期增减" which is year-over-year comparison, not quarter-over-quarter (previous reporting period).

Let me check section [2.3] to see if there's more detailed information about revenue changes, or if there's a different comparison metric available.</think>
<search>{"action":"open","anchor_id":"2.3","expected_evidence":"营业收入变动情况及原因说明"}</search>

--- Round 3 ---
<think>I've now reviewed sections [2.1] and [2.3] of DOC3.

From section [2.1], I found:
- 营业收入（元）: 2,327,574,815.97 (本报告期)
- 上年同期: 2,568,465,530.97
- 本报告期比上年同期增减: -9.38%

From section [2.3], I found various financial data changes but no additional revenue change information. The table shows profit statement items compared to "上年同期" (same period last year), not "上一报告期" (previous reporting period).

The question asks for "营业收入较上一报告期变化" (revenue change compared to the previous reporting period). The document only provides year-over-year comparison (-9.38%), not quarter-over-quarter comparison.

However, I should note that in quarterly reports, "上年同期" (same period last year) is the standard comparison metric. The document doesn't appear to have quarter-over-quarter data.

For this document (DOC3), the revenue change information I can extract is:
- 营业收入（元）|2,327,574,815.97|2,568,465,530.97|-9.38%

This is the only revenue change data available in this document. I should extract this as evidence and stop, as I've covered the relevant sections.

Let me stop and provide the evidence I found.</think>
<search>{"action":"stop","reason":"已查阅DOC3中所有与营业收入变化相关的章节，找到了营业收入同比变化数据为-9.38%"}</search>
<answer>["营业收入（元）|2,327,574,815.97|2,568,465,530.97|-9.38%"]</answer>
